thought.text: The list returns a generator. Let me fix that:

action.command:
cd /workspace/project/tb-difficulty-tuner && export WANDB_API_KEY="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" && export PINECONE_API_KEY="pcsk_3Vsf8s_UoX9xAA4AzvCu6kJFoAYxMs33WKzL3VdtgMpK2tSQUodh3oVBM62BnSZn22Zgzr" && python3 << 'EOF'
import os
from pinecone import Pinecone

pc = Pinecone(api_key=os.environ["PINECONE_API_KEY"])
index = pc.Index("agent-task-benchmark")

# Get trial IDs properly
all_trials = []
for ids in index.list(namespace="trials"):
    all_trials.extend(ids)
    if len(all_trials) >= 20:
        break

print(f"Found {len(all_trials)} trial IDs")

# Fetch trials with rich metadata
fetched = index.fetch(ids=all_trials[:5], namespace="trials")
for tid, vec in fetched.vectors.items():
    print(f"\n{'='*60}")
    print(f"Trial: {tid}")
    meta = vec.metadata
    for k, v in sorted(meta.items()):
        val_str = str(v)[:150] + "..." if len(str(v)) > 150 else str(v)
        print(f"  {k}: {val_str}")

# Now look at steps - these are the behavioral traces!
print("\n\n" + "="*60)
print("STEPS NAMESPACE (behavioral traces)")
print("="*60)

all_steps = []
for ids in index.list(namespace="steps"):
    all_steps.extend(ids)
    if len(all_steps) >= 10:
        break

print(f"Found {len(all_steps)} step IDs")
print(f"Sample: {all_steps[:3]}")

if all_steps:
    fetched_steps = index.fetch(ids=all_steps[:2], namespace="steps")
    for sid, vec in fetched_steps.vectors.items():
        print(f"\n{'='*60}")
        print(f"Step: {sid}")
        meta = vec.metadata
        for k, v in sorted(meta.items()):
            val_str = str(v)[:300] + "..." if len(str(v)) > 300 else str(v)
            print(f"  {k}: {val_str}")
EOF
